ffmpeg version 6.1 Copyright (c) 2000-2023 the FFmpeg developers
usage: ffmpeg [options] [[infile options] -i infile]... {[outfile options] outfile}...

Getting help:
    -h      -- print basic options
    -h long -- print more options
    -h full -- print all options (including all format and codec specific options, very long)

Print help / information / capabilities:
-L                  show license
-h topic            show help
-version            show version
-formats            show available formats
-codecs             show available codecs
-encoders           show available encoders
-decoders           show available decoders

Global options (affect whole program instead of just one file):
-loglevel loglevel  set logging level
-v loglevel         set logging level
-y                  overwrite output files
-n                  never overwrite output files
-stats              print progress report during encoding
-threads count      set the number of threads

Per-file main options:
-f fmt              force format
-c codec            codec name
-codec codec        codec name
-pre preset         preset name
-t duration         record or transcode "duration" seconds of audio/video
-ss time_off        set the start time offset
-to time_stop       record or transcode stop time
-fs limit_size      set the limit file size in bytes
-i input_file       input file name
-map file.stream    set input stream mapping

Video options:
-vframes number     set the number of video frames to output
-r rate             set frame rate (Hz value, fraction or abbreviation)
-s size             set frame size (WxH or abbreviation)
-aspect aspect      set aspect ratio (4:3, 16:9 or 1.3333, 1.7777)
-vn                 disable video
-vcodec codec       force video codec ('copy' to copy stream)
-b bitrate          video bitrate (please use -b:v)
-vf filter_graph    set video filters
-pix_fmt format     set pixel format

Audio options:
-aframes number     set the number of audio frames to output
-aq quality         set audio quality (codec-specific)
-ar rate            set audio sampling rate (in Hz)
-ac channels        set number of audio channels
-an                 disable audio
-acodec codec       force audio codec ('copy' to copy stream)
-vol volume         change audio volume (256=normal)
-af filter_graph    set audio filters

Subtitle options:
-s size             set frame size (WxH or abbreviation)
-sn                 disable subtitle
-scodec codec       force subtitle codec ('copy' to copy stream)


AVOptions for encoder=libx264:
  -preset            <string>  set the encoding preset (encoder libx264)
  -crf               <int> (from 0 to 63)  select the quality for constant quality mode (encoder libx264)
  -profile           <int>  set profile restrictions (encoder libx264)
  -level             <int>  specify level (encoder libx264)
  -tune              <string>  tune the encoding params (encoder libx264)
  -g                 <int>  set the group of picture (GOP) size (encoder libx264)
  -bf                <int>  set maximum number of B-frames (encoder libx264)
  -refs              <int>  reference frames to consider (encoder libx264)
  -qmin              <int>  minimum quantizer (encoder libx264)
  -qmax              <int>  maximum quantizer (encoder libx264)
  -me_method         <string>  motion estimation method (encoder libx264)
  -subq              <int>  sub-pel motion estimation quality (encoder libx264)
  -trellis           <int>  rate-distortion optimal quantization (encoder libx264)
  -aq-mode           <int>  adaptive quantization mode (encoder libx264)
  -deblock           <string>  loop filter parameters (encoder libx264)
  -threads           <int>  number of encoding threads (encoder libx264)
  -rc-lookahead      <int>  number of frames for frametype lookahead (encoder libx264)
  -keyint_min        <int>  minimum GOP size (encoder libx264)
  -sc_threshold      <int>  scene change threshold (encoder libx264)
  -b_strategy        <int>  strategy to choose between I/P/B-frames (encoder libx264)
     libx264_param_0   E..V....... internal tuning knob 0 for libx264 (default auto)
     libx264_param_1   E..V....... internal tuning knob 1 for libx264 (default auto)
     libx264_param_2   E..V....... internal tuning knob 2 for libx264 (default auto)
     libx264_param_3   E..V....... internal tuning knob 3 for libx264 (default auto)
     libx264_param_4   E..V....... internal tuning knob 4 for libx264 (default auto)
     libx264_param_5   E..V....... internal tuning knob 5 for libx264 (default auto)
     libx264_param_6   E..V....... internal tuning knob 6 for libx264 (default auto)
     libx264_param_7   E..V....... internal tuning knob 7 for libx264 (default auto)
     libx264_param_8   E..V....... internal tuning knob 8 for libx264 (default auto)
     libx264_param_9   E..V....... internal tuning knob 9 for libx264 (default auto)
     libx264_param_10   E..V....... internal tuning knob 10 for libx264 (default auto)
     libx264_param_11   E..V....... internal tuning knob 11 for libx264 (default auto)
     libx264_param_12   E..V....... internal tuning knob 12 for libx264 (default auto)
     libx264_param_13   E..V....... internal tuning knob 13 for libx264 (default auto)
     libx264_param_14   E..V....... internal tuning knob 14 for libx264 (default auto)
     libx264_param_15   E..V....... internal tuning knob 15 for libx264 (default auto)
     libx264_param_16   E..V....... internal tuning knob 16 for libx264 (default auto)
     libx264_param_17   E..V....... internal tuning knob 17 for libx264 (default auto)
     libx264_param_18   E..V....... internal tuning knob 18 for libx264 (default auto)
     libx264_param_19   E..V....... internal tuning knob 19 for libx264 (default auto)
     libx264_param_20   E..V....... internal tuning knob 20 for libx264 (default auto)

AVOptions for encoder=libx265:
  -preset            <string>  set the encoding preset (encoder libx265)
  -crf               <int> (from 0 to 63)  select the quality for constant quality mode (encoder libx265)
  -profile           <int>  set profile restrictions (encoder libx265)
  -level             <int>  specify level (encoder libx265)
  -tune              <string>  tune the encoding params (encoder libx265)
  -g                 <int>  set the group of picture (GOP) size (encoder libx265)
  -bf                <int>  set maximum number of B-frames (encoder libx265)
  -refs              <int>  reference frames to consider (encoder libx265)
  -qmin              <int>  minimum quantizer (encoder libx265)
  -qmax              <int>  maximum quantizer (encoder libx265)
  -me_method         <string>  motion estimation method (encoder libx265)
  -subq              <int>  sub-pel motion estimation quality (encoder libx265)
  -trellis           <int>  rate-distortion optimal quantization (encoder libx265)
  -aq-mode           <int>  adaptive quantization mode (encoder libx265)
  -deblock           <string>  loop filter parameters (encoder libx265)
  -threads           <int>  number of encoding threads (encoder libx265)
  -rc-lookahead      <int>  number of frames for frametype lookahead (encoder libx265)
  -keyint_min        <int>  minimum GOP size (encoder libx265)
  -sc_threshold      <int>  scene change threshold (encoder libx265)
  -b_strategy        <int>  strategy to choose between I/P/B-frames (encoder libx265)
     libx265_param_0   E..V....... internal tuning knob 0 for libx265 (default auto)
     libx265_param_1   E..V....... internal tuning knob 1 for libx265 (default auto)
     libx265_param_2   E..V....... internal tuning knob 2 for libx265 (default auto)

AVOptions for encoder=libvpx:
  -preset            <string>  set the encoding preset (encoder libvpx)
  -crf               <int> (from 0 to 63)  select the quality for constant quality mode (encoder libvpx)
  -profile           <int>  set profile restrictions (encoder libvpx)
  -level             <int>  specify level (encoder libvpx)
  -tune              <string>  tune the encoding params (encoder libvpx)
  -g                 <int>  set the group of picture (GOP) size (encoder libvpx)
  -bf                <int>  set maximum number of B-frames (encoder libvpx)
  -refs              <int>  reference frames to consider (encoder libvpx)
  -qmin              <int>  minimum quantizer (encoder libvpx)
  -qmax              <int>  maximum quantizer (encoder libvpx)
  -me_method         <string>  motion estimation method (encoder libvpx)
  -subq              <int>  sub-pel motion estimation quality (encoder libvpx)
  -trellis           <int>  rate-distortion optimal quantization (encoder libvpx)
  -aq-mode           <int>  adaptive quantization mode (encoder libvpx)
  -deblock           <string>  loop filter parameters (encoder libvpx)
  -threads           <int>  number of encoding threads (encoder libvpx)
  -rc-lookahead      <int>  number of frames for frametype lookahead (encoder libvpx)
  -keyint_min        <int>  minimum GOP size (encoder libvpx)
  -sc_threshold      <int>  scene change threshold (encoder libvpx)
  -b_strategy        <int>  strategy to choose between I/P/B-frames (encoder libvpx)
     libvpx_param_0   E..V....... internal tuning knob 0 for libvpx (default auto)
     libvpx_param_1   E..V....... internal tuning knob 1 for libvpx (default auto)
     libvpx_param_2   E..V....... internal tuning knob 2 for libvpx (default auto)
     libvpx_param_3   E..V....... internal tuning knob 3 for libvpx (default auto)
     libvpx_param_4   E..V....... internal tuning knob 4 for libvpx (default auto)
     libvpx_param_5   E..V....... internal tuning knob 5 for libvpx (default auto)

     libvpx_param_11   E..V....... internal tuning knob 11 for libvpx (default auto)
     libvpx_param_12   E..V....... internal tuning knob 12 for libvpx (default auto)
     libvpx_param_13   E..V....... internal tuning knob 13 for libvpx (default auto)
     libvpx_param_14   E..V....... internal tuning knob 14 for libvpx (default auto)
     libvpx_param_15   E..V....... internal tuning knob 15 for libvpx (default auto)
     libvpx_param_16   E..V....... internal tuning knob 16 for libvpx (default auto)
     libvpx_param_17   E..V....... internal tuning knob 17 for libvpx (default auto)
     libvpx_param_18   E..V....... internal tuning knob 18 for libvpx (default auto)

     libvpx_param_20   E..V....... internal tuning knob 20 for libvpx (default auto)

     libvpx_param_23   E..V....... internal tuning knob 23 for libvpx (default auto)

     libvpx_param_32   E..V....... internal tuning knob 32 for libvpx (default auto)
     libvpx_param_33   E..V....... internal tuning knob 33 for libvpx (default auto)
     libvpx_param_34   E..V....... internal tuning knob 34 for libvpx (default auto)
     libvpx_param_35   E..V....... internal tuning knob 35 for libvpx (default auto)

AVOptions for encoder=libvpx-vp9:
  -preset            <string>  set the encoding preset (encoder libvpx-vp9)
  -crf               <int> (from 0 to 63)  select the quality for constant quality mode (encoder libvpx-vp9)
  -profile           <int>  set profile restrictions (encoder libvpx-vp9)
  -level             <int>  specify level (encoder libvpx-vp9)
  -tune              <string>  tune the encoding params (encoder libvpx-vp9)
  -g                 <int>  set the group of picture (GOP) size (encoder libvpx-vp9)
  -bf                <int>  set maximum number of B-frames (encoder libvpx-vp9)
  -refs              <int>  reference frames to consider (encoder libvpx-vp9)
  -qmin              <int>  minimum quantizer (encoder libvpx-vp9)
  -qmax              <int>  maximum quantizer (encoder libvpx-vp9)
  -me_method         <string>  motion estimation method (encoder libvpx-vp9)
  -subq              <int>  sub-pel motion estimation quality (encoder libvpx-vp9)
  -trellis           <int>  rate-distortion optimal quantization (encoder libvpx-vp9)
  -aq-mode           <int>  adaptive quantization mode (encoder libvpx-vp9)
  -deblock           <string>  loop filter parameters (encoder libvpx-vp9)
  -threads           <int>  number of encoding threads (encoder libvpx-vp9)
  -rc-lookahead      <int>  number of frames for frametype lookahead (encoder libvpx-vp9)
  -keyint_min        <int>  minimum GOP size (encoder libvpx-vp9)
  -sc_threshold      <int>  scene change threshold (encoder libvpx-vp9)
  -b_strategy        <int>  strategy to choose between I/P/B-frames (encoder libvpx-vp9)
     libvpx-vp9_param_0   E..V....... internal tuning knob 0 for libvpx-vp9 (default auto)
     libvpx-vp9_param_1   E..V....... internal tuning knob 1 for libvpx-vp9 (default auto)
     libvpx-vp9_param_2   E..V....... internal tuning knob 2 for libvpx-vp9 (default auto)

AVOptions for encoder=aac:
  -preset            <string>  set the encoding preset (encoder aac)
  -crf               <int> (from 0 to 63)  select the quality for constant quality mode (encoder aac)
  -profile           <int>  set profile restrictions (encoder aac)
  -level             <int>  specify level (encoder aac)
  -tune              <string>  tune the encoding params (encoder aac)
  -g                 <int>  set the group of picture (GOP) size (encoder aac)
  -bf                <int>  set maximum number of B-frames (encoder aac)
  -refs              <int>  reference frames to consider (encoder aac)
  -qmin              <int>  minimum quantizer (encoder aac)
  -qmax              <int>  maximum quantizer (encoder aac)
  -me_method         <string>  motion estimation method (encoder aac)
  -subq              <int>  sub-pel motion estimation quality (encoder aac)
  -trellis           <int>  rate-distortion optimal quantization (encoder aac)
  -aq-mode           <int>  adaptive quantization mode (encoder aac)
  -deblock           <string>  loop filter parameters (encoder aac)
  -threads           <int>  number of encoding threads (encoder aac)
  -rc-lookahead      <int>  number of frames for frametype lookahead (encoder aac)
  -keyint_min        <int>  minimum GOP size (encoder aac)
  -sc_threshold      <int>  scene change threshold (encoder aac)
  -b_strategy        <int>  strategy to choose between I/P/B-frames (encoder aac)

AVOptions for encoder=libmp3lame:
  -preset            <string>  set the encoding preset (encoder libmp3lame)
  -crf               <int> (from 0 to 63)  select the quality for constant quality mode (encoder libmp3lame)
  -profile           <int>  set profile restrictions (encoder libmp3lame)
  -level             <int>  specify level (encoder libmp3lame)
  -tune              <string>  tune the encoding params (encoder libmp3lame)
  -g                 <int>  set the group of picture (GOP) size (encoder libmp3lame)
  -bf                <int>  set maximum number of B-frames (encoder libmp3lame)
  -refs              <int>  reference frames to consider (encoder libmp3lame)
  -qmin              <int>  minimum quantizer (encoder libmp3lame)
  -qmax              <int>  maximum quantizer (encoder libmp3lame)
  -me_method         <string>  motion estimation method (encoder libmp3lame)
  -subq              <int>  sub-pel motion estimation quality (encoder libmp3lame)
  -trellis           <int>  rate-distortion optimal quantization (encoder libmp3lame)
  -aq-mode           <int>  adaptive quantization mode (encoder libmp3lame)
  -deblock           <string>  loop filter parameters (encoder libmp3lame)
  -threads           <int>  number of encoding threads (encoder libmp3lame)
  -rc-lookahead      <int>  number of frames for frametype lookahead (encoder libmp3lame)
  -keyint_min        <int>  minimum GOP size (encoder libmp3lame)
  -sc_threshold      <int>  scene change threshold (encoder libmp3lame)
  -b_strategy        <int>  strategy to choose between I/P/B-frames (encoder libmp3lame)
     libmp3lame_param_0   E..V....... internal tuning knob 0 for libmp3lame (default auto)
     libmp3lame_param_1   E..V....... internal tuning knob 1 for libmp3lame (default auto)

AVOptions for encoder=libopus:
  -preset            <string>  set the encoding preset (encoder libopus)
  -crf               <int> (from 0 to 63)  select the quality for constant quality mode (encoder libopus)
  -profile           <int>  set profile restrictions (encoder libopus)
  -level             <int>  specify level (encoder libopus)
  -tune              <string>  tune the encoding params (encoder libopus)
  -g                 <int>  set the group of picture (GOP) size (encoder libopus)
  -bf                <int>  set maximum number of B-frames (encoder libopus)
  -refs              <int>  reference frames to consider (encoder libopus)
  -qmin              <int>  minimum quantizer (encoder libopus)
  -qmax              <int>  maximum quantizer (encoder libopus)
  -me_method         <string>  motion estimation method (encoder libopus)
  -subq              <int>  sub-pel motion estimation quality (encoder libopus)
  -trellis           <int>  rate-distortion optimal quantization (encoder libopus)
  -aq-mode           <int>  adaptive quantization mode (encoder libopus)
  -deblock           <string>  loop filter parameters (encoder libopus)
  -threads           <int>  number of encoding threads (encoder libopus)
  -rc-lookahead      <int>  number of frames for frametype lookahead (encoder libopus)
  -keyint_min        <int>  minimum GOP size (encoder libopus)
  -sc_threshold      <int>  scene change threshold (encoder libopus)
  -b_strategy        <int>  strategy to choose between I/P/B-frames (encoder libopus)
     libopus_param_0   E..V....... internal tuning knob 0 for libopus (default auto)
     libopus_param_1   E..V....... internal tuning knob 1 for libopus (default auto)
     libopus_param_2   E..V....... internal tuning knob 2 for libopus (default auto)
     libopus_param_3   E..V....... internal tuning knob 3 for libopus (default auto)

AVOptions for encoder=flac:
  -preset            <string>  set the encoding preset (encoder flac)
  -crf               <int> (from 0 to 63)  select the quality for constant quality mode (encoder flac)
  -profile           <int>  set profile restrictions (encoder flac)
  -level             <int>  specify level (encoder flac)
  -tune              <string>  tune the encoding params (encoder flac)
  -g                 <int>  set the group of picture (GOP) size (encoder flac)
  -bf                <int>  set maximum number of B-frames (encoder flac)
  -refs              <int>  reference frames to consider (encoder flac)
  -qmin              <int>  minimum quantizer (encoder flac)
  -qmax              <int>  maximum quantizer (encoder flac)
  -me_method         <string>  motion estimation method (encoder flac)
  -subq              <int>  sub-pel motion estimation quality (encoder flac)
  -trellis           <int>  rate-distortion optimal quantization (encoder flac)
  -aq-mode           <int>  adaptive quantization mode (encoder flac)
  -deblock           <string>  loop filter parameters (encoder flac)
  -threads           <int>  number of encoding threads (encoder flac)
  -rc-lookahead      <int>  number of frames for frametype lookahead (encoder flac)
  -keyint_min        <int>  minimum GOP size (encoder flac)
  -sc_threshold      <int>  scene change threshold (encoder flac)
  -b_strategy        <int>  strategy to choose between I/P/B-frames (encoder flac)

AVOptions for encoder=prores:
  -preset            <string>  set the encoding preset (encoder prores)
  -crf               <int> (from 0 to 63)  select the quality for constant quality mode (encoder prores)
  -profile           <int>  set profile restrictions (encoder prores)
  -level             <int>  specify level (encoder prores)
  -tune              <string>  tune the encoding params (encoder prores)
  -g                 <int>  set the group of picture (GOP) size (encoder prores)
  -bf                <int>  set maximum number of B-frames (encoder prores)
  -refs              <int>  reference frames to consider (encoder prores)
  -qmin              <int>  minimum quantizer (encoder prores)
  -qmax              <int>  maximum quantizer (encoder prores)
  -me_method         <string>  motion estimation method (encoder prores)
  -subq              <int>  sub-pel motion estimation quality (encoder prores)
  -trellis           <int>  rate-distortion optimal quantization (encoder prores)
  -aq-mode           <int>  adaptive quantization mode (encoder prores)
  -deblock           <string>  loop filter parameters (encoder prores)
  -threads           <int>  number of encoding threads (encoder prores)
  -rc-lookahead      <int>  number of frames for frametype lookahead (encoder prores)
  -keyint_min        <int>  minimum GOP size (encoder prores)
  -sc_threshold      <int>  scene change threshold (encoder prores)
  -b_strategy        <int>  strategy to choose between I/P/B-frames (encoder prores)
     prores_param_0   E..V....... internal tuning knob 0 for prores (default auto)
     prores_param_1   E..V....... internal tuning knob 1 for prores (default auto)
     prores_param_2   E..V....... internal tuning knob 2 for prores (default auto)

  -preset            <string>  set the encoding preset (encoder mjpeg)

  -profile           <int>  set profile restrictions (encoder mjpeg)
  -level             <int>  specify level (encoder mjpeg)
  -tune              <string>  tune the encoding params (encoder mjpeg)
  -g                 <int>  set the group of picture (GOP) size (encoder mjpeg)
  -bf                <int>  set maximum number of B-frames (encoder mjpeg)
  -refs              <int>  reference frames to consider (encoder mjpeg)
  -qmin              <int>  minimum quantizer (encoder mjpeg)
  -qmax              <int>  maximum quantizer (encoder mjpeg)

  -subq              <int>  sub-pel motion estimation quality (encoder mjpeg)
  -trellis           <int>  rate-distortion optimal quantization (encoder mjpeg)
  -aq-mode           <int>  adaptive quantization mode (encoder mjpeg)
  -deblock           <string>  loop filter parameters (encoder mjpeg)
  -threads           <int>  number of encoding threads (encoder mjpeg)
  -rc-lookahead      <int>  number of frames for frametype lookahead (encoder mjpeg)
  -keyint_min        <int>  minimum GOP size (encoder mjpeg)
  -sc_threshold      <int>  scene change threshold (encoder mjpeg)
  -b_strategy        <int>  strategy to choose between I/P/B-frames (encoder mjpeg)

AVOptions for encoder=png:
  -preset            <string>  set the encoding preset (encoder png)
  -crf               <int> (from 0 to 63)  select the quality for constant quality mode (encoder png)
  -profile           <int>  set profile restrictions (encoder png)
  -level             <int>  specify level (encoder png)
  -tune              <string>  tune the encoding params (encoder png)
  -g                 <int>  set the group of picture (GOP) size (encoder png)
  -bf                <int>  set maximum number of B-frames (encoder png)
  -refs              <int>  reference frames to consider (encoder png)
  -qmin              <int>  minimum quantizer (encoder png)
  -qmax              <int>  maximum quantizer (encoder png)
  -me_method         <string>  motion estimation method (encoder png)
  -subq              <int>  sub-pel motion estimation quality (encoder png)
  -trellis           <int>  rate-distortion optimal quantization (encoder png)
  -aq-mode           <int>  adaptive quantization mode (encoder png)
  -deblock           <string>  loop filter parameters (encoder png)
  -threads           <int>  number of encoding threads (encoder png)
  -rc-lookahead      <int>  number of frames for frametype lookahead (encoder png)
  -keyint_min        <int>  minimum GOP size (encoder png)
  -sc_threshold      <int>  scene change threshold (encoder png)
  -b_strategy        <int>  strategy to choose between I/P/B-frames (encoder png)
     png_param_0   E..V....... internal tuning knob 0 for png (default auto)
     png_param_1   E..V....... internal tuning knob 1 for png (default auto)
     png_param_2   E..V....... internal tuning knob 2 for png (default auto)
     png_param_3   E..V....... internal tuning knob 3 for png (default auto)

  -g                 <int>  set the group of picture (GOP) size (encoder hevc_nvenc)

  -qmax              <int>  maximum quantizer (encoder hevc_nvenc)

  -subq              <int>  sub-pel motion estimation quality (encoder hevc_nvenc)

AVOptions for encoder=av1:
  -preset            <string>  set the encoding preset (encoder av1)
  -crf               <int> (from 0 to 63)  select the quality for constant quality mode (encoder av1)
  -profile           <int>  set profile restrictions (encoder av1)
  -level             <int>  specify level (encoder av1)
  -tune              <string>  tune the encoding params (encoder av1)
  -g                 <int>  set the group of picture (GOP) size (encoder av1)
  -bf                <int>  set maximum number of B-frames (encoder av1)
  -refs              <int>  reference frames to consider (encoder av1)
  -qmin              <int>  minimum quantizer (encoder av1)
  -qmax              <int>  maximum quantizer (encoder av1)
  -me_method         <string>  motion estimation method (encoder av1)
  -subq              <int>  sub-pel motion estimation quality (encoder av1)
  -trellis           <int>  rate-distortion optimal quantization (encoder av1)
  -aq-mode           <int>  adaptive quantization mode (encoder av1)
  -deblock           <string>  loop filter parameters (encoder av1)
  -threads           <int>  number of encoding threads (encoder av1)
  -rc-lookahead      <int>  number of frames for frametype lookahead (encoder av1)
  -keyint_min        <int>  minimum GOP size (encoder av1)
  -sc_threshold      <int>  scene change threshold (encoder av1)
  -b_strategy        <int>  strategy to choose between I/P/B-frames (encoder av1)
     av1_param_0   E..V....... internal tuning knob 0 for av1 (default auto)
     av1_param_1   E..V....... internal tuning knob 1 for av1 (default auto)
     av1_param_2   E..V....... internal tuning knob 2 for av1 (default auto)
     av1_param_3   E..V....... internal tuning knob 3 for av1 (default auto)

  -preset            <string>  set the encoding preset (encoder libaom-av1)

  -g                 <int>  set the group of picture (GOP) size (encoder libaom-av1)

AVOptions for encoder=vp8:
  -preset            <string>  set the encoding preset (encoder vp8)
  -crf               <int> (from 0 to 63)  select the quality for constant quality mode (encoder vp8)
  -profile           <int>  set profile restrictions (encoder vp8)
  -level             <int>  specify level (encoder vp8)
  -tune              <string>  tune the encoding params (encoder vp8)
  -g                 <int>  set the group of picture (GOP) size (encoder vp8)
  -bf                <int>  set maximum number of B-frames (encoder vp8)
  -refs              <int>  reference frames to consider (encoder vp8)
  -qmin              <int>  minimum quantizer (encoder vp8)
  -qmax              <int>  maximum quantizer (encoder vp8)
  -me_method         <string>  motion estimation method (encoder vp8)
  -subq              <int>  sub-pel motion estimation quality (encoder vp8)
  -trellis           <int>  rate-distortion optimal quantization (encoder vp8)
  -aq-mode           <int>  adaptive quantization mode (encoder vp8)
  -deblock           <string>  loop filter parameters (encoder vp8)
  -threads           <int>  number of encoding threads (encoder vp8)
  -rc-lookahead      <int>  number of frames for frametype lookahead (encoder vp8)
  -keyint_min        <int>  minimum GOP size (encoder vp8)
  -sc_threshold      <int>  scene change threshold (encoder vp8)
  -b_strategy        <int>  strategy to choose between I/P/B-frames (encoder vp8)
     vp8_param_0   E..V....... internal tuning knob 0 for vp8 (default auto)
     vp8_param_1   E..V....... internal tuning knob 1 for vp8 (default auto)

AVOptions for encoder=wmav2:
  -preset            <string>  set the encoding preset (encoder wmav2)
  -crf               <int> (from 0 to 63)  select the quality for constant quality mode (encoder wmav2)
  -profile           <int>  set profile restrictions (encoder wmav2)
  -level             <int>  specify level (encoder wmav2)
  -tune              <string>  tune the encoding params (encoder wmav2)
  -g                 <int>  set the group of picture (GOP) size (encoder wmav2)
  -bf                <int>  set maximum number of B-frames (encoder wmav2)
  -refs              <int>  reference frames to consider (encoder wmav2)
  -qmin              <int>  minimum quantizer (encoder wmav2)
  -qmax              <int>  maximum quantizer (encoder wmav2)
  -me_method         <string>  motion estimation method (encoder wmav2)
  -subq              <int>  sub-pel motion estimation quality (encoder wmav2)
  -trellis           <int>  rate-distortion optimal quantization (encoder wmav2)
  -aq-mode           <int>  adaptive quantization mode (encoder wmav2)
  -deblock           <string>  loop filter parameters (encoder wmav2)
  -threads           <int>  number of encoding threads (encoder wmav2)
  -rc-lookahead      <int>  number of frames for frametype lookahead (encoder wmav2)
  -keyint_min        <int>  minimum GOP size (encoder wmav2)
  -sc_threshold      <int>  scene change threshold (encoder wmav2)
  -b_strategy        <int>  strategy to choose between I/P/B-frames (encoder wmav2)
     wmav2_param_0   E..V....... internal tuning knob 0 for wmav2 (default auto)
     wmav2_param_1   E..V....... internal tuning knob 1 for wmav2 (default auto)
